description: Benchmarks that cannot be fixed by code changes — upstream dataset/library issues, missing lm-eval tasks, or invalid cache entries.

categories.reason: facebook/flores HF dataset has NO English to African configs (eng_Latn-amh_Ethi etc.). Only African to English exists. The lm-eval yamls reference these missing configs. eng_Latn-afr_Latn is the ONLY English to African config that exists.
categories.fix: Dataset maintainer uploads English to African configs to facebook/flores.

categories.reason: lm-eval evalita_llm NER v2 yamls reference utils.filter_per_entities_from_lines which does not exist in evalita_llm/utils.py. AttributeError on task load.
categories.fix: Upstream lm-eval-harness adds missing function or removes YAML reference.

categories.reason: opencompass/LiveMathBench configs (v202412_hard_en, v202412_CNMO_en, v202505_all_en, etc.) no longer available on HuggingFace.
categories.fix: Dataset maintainer re-publishes or extractor points to new path.

categories.reason: Korean Bar Exam 2025 tasks have no YAML in lm-eval-harness. Only years up to 2024.
kormedmcqa_medicine is not an lm-eval subtask. Valid names: kormedmcqa_doctor, kormedmcqa_nurse, kormedmcqa_pharm, kormedmcqa_dentist.
Maps to wmt14-fr-en (millions of sentence pairs, over 5min load). Gpt3Extractor returns 0 pairs. Original gpt3_translation_benchmarks is not a real lm-eval task either.
categories.fix: Delete cache entry. Gpt3Extractor is broken by design.

categories.reason: Group tasks that expand to subtasks. One subtask (siqa_ca or similar) raises NonMatchingSplitsSizesError from datasets library.
Cache name ntrex has no lm-eval group YAML. Actual tasks are ntrex_afr_Latn-eng_Latn_prompt_1 etc.
categories.fix: Add TASK_NAME_MAPPING redirect or delete cache entry.

categories.category: flores African to English sporadic network failures
categories.reason: Some flores African to English tasks fail sporadically from HF Hub rate limits or network timeouts during dataset download. Pass on retry.

categories.category: bare name cache artifacts (no matching lm-eval task)
categories.reason: Cache entries with bare names (summarization, prompt, self, super) that are word fragments not matching any lm-eval task. These are artifacts from early cache generation.
categories.fix: Delete cache entries or ignore — no real benchmark to load.

categories.reason: tau/scrolls narrative_qa dataset is 30GB+. Loading triggers memory/time issues locally. The dataset loads but processing all documents takes extremely long.
categories.fix: Run on high-memory instance or precompute pairs from a subset.
